data.content:
Plan review:

- Plan correctly identifies the single caller and the canonical formatter to use.
- Output format change (· → space) is documented and acceptable per the contract.
- Empty-input guard preserves callsite UX (no "Unknown" badge appears when agent fields are absent).
- Out-of-scope guardrails respected (no edits to agent-identity.ts or beat-table-metadata.tsx).
- formatAgentDisplayLabel is the documented canonical display function (contract table row "Display label (UI)").
- Plan approved.
